name: teamcanvas
description: TeamCanvas — 팀 일정·협업 PWA (Cloudflare Pages + D1 + R2)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,cyan "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --prefix apps/web && npx wrangler pages dev apps/web/dist --port 8788 --local
scripts.pages:dev: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev apps/web/dist --port 8788
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run db:migrate:remote && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/web/dist --project-name=teamcanvas --branch=main
scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply teamcanvas-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply teamcanvas-db --remote
